title: Command Block UI Overhaul
description:
Enlarge the input box of the command block interface and add an automatic line wrap function.
将命令方块界面的输入框放大并加入自动换行功能。
body:
This mod enlarges the input box of the command block interface and adds automatic line wrapping, transforming the vanilla command block editing experience. Say goodbye to the struggle of scrolling left and right in a cramped single-line text box, and enjoy the convenience of a spacious multi-line editing interface!
该模组将命令方块界面的输入框放大并加入自动换行功能，改变原版命令方块的编辑体验。告别在狭窄的单行文本框中左右横移的痛苦，享受宽敞的多行编辑界面带来的便利！
